name: HunyuanWorld Panorama HQ
description: High-quality offline image-to-360 panorama runtime for Storyboard Copilot. It bridges a local HunyuanWorld-1.0 checkout and adds 360 panorama generation plus perspective extraction tools.

hardwareRequirements.summary: Designed for the HunyuanWorld-1.0 high-quality image-to-panorama pipeline. A CUDA NVIDIA GPU is strongly recommended for practical generation speed.
recommendations: Use a dedicated Python environment that can run HunyuanWorld-1.0 and point HUNYUANWORLD_PYTHON to that interpreter before starting the extension.
Clone HunyuanWorld-1.0 locally and point HUNYUANWORLD_REPO to the repo root so the extension can call demo_panogen.py directly.
Use the 4096x2048 preset for final output and keep 2048x1024 for faster iteration.
notes: This package does not bundle the HunyuanWorld source tree or model weights. It is a bridge package that starts quickly and calls your local checkout.
Perspective extraction can run from the generated panorama itself, but it still depends on a Python environment with Pillow and NumPy available.
If you want to use a different launcher script inside the repo, set HUNYUANWORLD_SCRIPT to the relative or absolute path of that file.

startupSteps.label: Validate bridge package
startupSteps.description: Check the runner script, Python launcher, and local environment variables.

startupSteps.label: Verify runtime
startupSteps.description: Start the Python bridge and check the HunyuanWorld integration points.

startupSteps.label: Verify local checkout
startupSteps.description: Confirm the repo path and panorama script are reachable.

startupSteps.label: Register panorama nodes
startupSteps.description: Expose the panorama generation and result nodes in the canvas menu.
